ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ACTION ON THE GROUNDS OF FORUM NON CONVENIENS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT CO., INC.'S MOTION TO STAY THE ACTION ON THE GROUNDS OF FORUM NON CONVENIENS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT OPPOSE A STAY. THE ACTION IS STAYED UNTIL SUCH TIME AS PLAINTIFF HAS OBTAINED JURISDICTION OVER ALL DEFENDANTS IN COLORADO, NEVADA OR UTAH AND, AT THAT TIME, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED. THE 2/16/12 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS VACATED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077. (220)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Brayton Purcell Llp
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Defendant Hanson Permanente Cement Inc.'s motion to stay is off calendar pursuant to the conditional non-opposition and proposed order that the Court already signed. Defendant Defendant Hanson Permanente Cement Inc.'s proceedings in this matter are stayed until October 9, 2012, date set for hearing of defendant's motion to disqualify plaintiff's counsel. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)

MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Continued To Aug-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Hanson Permanente Cement Inc.'s motion to stay is continued on the court's own motion to August 14. The motion will be granted pursuant to representations by counsel. On August 14 the motion will be taken off calendar if all orders have been signed and filed. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Off Calendar

Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ACTION ON THE GROUNDS OF FORUM NON CONVENIENS.

APPEARANCES: Joseph R. Connelly III, Esq. of Hawkins Parnell Thackston & Young LLP 766-3208 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc.'s motion to stay the action on the grounds of forum non conveniens is granted. Plaintiff did not oppose a stay. The action is stayed until such time as plaintiff has obtained jurisdiction over all defendants in Colorado, Nevada or Utah and, at that time, the case will be dismissed. The 2/16/12 case management conference is vacated. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(220/HEK)

MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Off Calendar
